title: App Settings - General
scenario: Verify that navigating to App Settings > General displays the correct sections and that going back returns to the Poly Lens Menu.
steps: Tap the App Settings icon (hamburger icon).
Verify that a new screen opens displaying the following sections: Account, About, Notifications & Device Alerts, Privacy Policy, and Licenses.
Verify that the user returns to the Poly Lens Menu.
expected: Tapping the App Settings icon and then "General" opens a new screen displaying sections: Account, About, Notifications & Device Alerts, Privacy Policy, and Licenses. Going back returns the user to the Poly Lens Menu.
